title: Perun and Veles: The Cosmic Struggle
description: The thunder god Perun battles the serpent-god Veles — the core myth of Slavic religion, paralleling Thor vs. Jormungandr.
introduction: The thunder god Perun battles the serpent-god Veles — the core myth of Slavic religion, paralleling Thor vs. Jormungandr.

translation.text: Perun, from the top of the World Tree, hurled his thunderbolt at Veles, who lay coiled at the roots.
